message:
test(quota_gate): add latency benchmark verifying <10ms criterion (ft-2dss0)

Adds evaluate_latency_under_10ms test that measures 1000 evaluations
with worst-case signals (budget + rate limit + account quota all active).
Validates the <10ms quota check latency acceptance criterion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
